Job description

About Impetus

Impetus is a global data, analytics, and AI consulting firm that helps enterprises modernize their data platforms and drive measurable business outcomes. We partner with leading cloud and technology providers to deliver innovative solutions across industries such as Banking, Financial Services, Insurance, and Life Sciences, as well as other data-intensive sectors. Our teams work at the forefront of cloud, data engineering, and artificial intelligence, helping organizations unlock the full value of their data.

Internship Overview

The Impetus Summer Internship Program is designed for highly motivated students who want to gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced, technology-driven environment. As an intern, you will work on real-world projects, collaborate with experienced mentors, and contribute to impactful client engagements and internal innovation initiatives involving Generative AI, machine learning, and advanced data platforms. This program provides exposure to enterprise-scale technology solutions, structured mentorship, and opportunities to build both technical and professional skills.

Key Responsibilities

Assist in the design, development, and testing of software applications and data solutions
Support projects related to Data Engineering, Generative AI (GenAI), Analytics, Business Intelligence, or Cloud Transformation
Conduct research and analysis to support client solutions and internal innovation initiatives
Develop dashboards, reports, and proof-of-concept solutions
Contribute to technical documentation, knowledge sharing, and process improvement initiatives

Eligibility Criteria

Applicants must be:

Currently pursuing:
Bachelor’s degree (Junior year preferred), or
First year of a Master’s/Postgraduate program
Majoring in Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Science, Engineering, Business Analytics, or a related field
Maintaining a strong academic record
Authorized to work in the United States

Preferred Skills

Programming knowledge in Python, Java, SQL, or similar languages
Understanding of data structures, algorithms, machine learning concepts, or AI techniques
Exposure to Generative AI tools, prompt engineering, or context engineering
Familiarity with Knowledge Graphs, GraphRAG, or advanced retrieval techniques is a plus
Experience or exposure to cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) is beneficial
Strong analytical, problem-solving, and critical thinking skills
Excellent communication and collaboration abilities
Curiosity and eagerness to learn in a dynamic technology environment

What You Will Gain

Hands-on experience working on real enterprise technology projects
Structured mentorship from experienced industry professionals
Exposure to cutting-edge technologies in cloud, data engineering, and AI
Opportunities to network with technology leaders and peers
Potential opportunity for a Pre-Placement Offer (PPO) based on internship performance

Impetus is focused on creating big business impact through big data solutions for Fortune 1000 enterprises. The company offers a unique mix of software products, consulting services, data science capabilities and technology expertise. Impetus offers full life-cycle services for big data technology implementations, including technology strategy, solution architecture, proof of concept, production implementation and on-going support to its clients.
